title: High Court Bail Docket IN-BAIL-2023-0274
summary: Dhavalsinh Balubha Sodha was arrested in connection with FIR I-C.R.No.29 of 2019 for offences of kidnapping and robbery under IPC and Gujarat Police Act, along with Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribes (Prevention of Atrocities) Act provisions. The complainant later filed an affidavit indicating...
